records.ety: [OE. ore, yare, are, AS. gera;akin to ger a year, E. year. √204. See Year.]

defs: In time long past; in old time; long since.
quotes: As it hath been of olde times yore.
Which though he hath polluted oft and yore, Yet I to them for judgment just do fly.
Where Abraham fed his flock of yore.
